title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: Welcome to Poly Studio screen appears during onboarding and tapping Get Started returns user to Organized screen
steps: 1. Fresh install the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Verify that the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears during onboarding.
5. Continue through the onboarding screens until reaching the "Organized" screen.
6. On the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen, tap the "Get Started" button.
7. Observe the result after tapping "Get Started".
expected: Tapping "Get Started" should close the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen and return the user to the "Organized" screen to continue progressing through the onboarding flow.
